'''bakaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scabrities|scabrities]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scabrities|scabrities]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bakaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bækæyæth|bækæyæth]] || [[word:bækæyæj|bækæyæj]] || [[word:bækæyæsh|bækæyæsh]] || [[word:bækæyæ|bækæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bakakayath|bakakayath]] || [[word:bakakayaj|bakakayaj]] || [[word:bakakayash|bakakayash]] || [[word:bakakaya|bakakaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bakayath|bakayath]] || [[word:bakayaj|bakayaj]] || [[word:bakayash|bakayash]] || [[word:bakaya|bakaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bakafyath|bakafyath]] || [[word:bakafyaj|bakafyaj]] || [[word:bakafyash|bakafyash]] || [[word:bakafyaf|bakafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bakayatha|bakayatha]] || [[word:bakayaja|bakayaja]] || [[word:bakayasha|bakayasha]] || [[word:bakayaka|bakayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bakayath|bakayath]] || [[word:bakayaj|bakayaj]] || [[word:bakayash|bakayash]] || [[word:bakaya|bakaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bakayathal|bakayathal]] || [[word:bakayajal|bakayajal]] || [[word:bakayashal|bakayashal]] || [[word:bakayakal|bakayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bakayathatha|bakayathatha]] || [[word:bakayajaja|bakayajaja]] || [[word:bakayashasha|bakayashasha]] || [[word:bakayaka|bakayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bakayathan|bakayathan]] || [[word:bakayajan|bakayajan]] || [[word:bakayashan|bakayashan]] || [[word:bakayakan|bakayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bakayathaoro|bakayathaoro]] || [[word:bakayajaoro|bakayajaoro]] || [[word:bakayashaoro|bakayashaoro]] || [[word:bakayakaoro|bakayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
